description.$value: Profit share is the income reflected to your account at the end of the term, based on the profit/loss partnership in your participation account. Unlike interest, it is not committed in advance and finalized at the end of the term.
Murabaha is a financing method in which the bank purchases the required goods upfront and sells them to the customer on deferred payment terms, clearly disclosing both the cost and the profit margin.
An index composed of publicly traded companies whose activities comply with participation finance principles.
Your savings will be invested in the participation fund pool. At maturity, any profit or loss generated will be reflected in your account according to the agreed profit-and-loss sharing ratio.

helper.$value: This is not a deposit. No profit is committed in advance.

description.$value: A lease certificate (sukuk) is an investment certificate representing ownership or beneficial rights in an underlying asset. It is asset-backed and does not involve interest.
Select the goods or services you would like to purchase. Albaraka purchases the selected goods or services and sells them on deferred payment terms.

helper.$value: This is not a loan. It is a financing method based on Murabaha principles.

Own the home you've always dreamed of. Albaraka purchases the property and sells it to you on deferred payment terms.
Stock buy and sell orders can only be submitted during BIST trading hours (10:00 AM–6:00 PM). Orders cannot be placed outside trading hours.

Albaraka is a participation bank. Financial solutions based on profit-and-loss sharing principles are offered instead of interest. The product you are looking for may be available under the "Profit Share" category.
